response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ year requirement with roughly 15 years of professional development, including recent full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React product work at Optilyz and RIDE Capital, and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq — a rare and explicitly required skill. A deep testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, authored test frameworks, CI/CD, Docker/Kubernetes) fits the role's quality emphasis. Gaps are framework-specific rather than fundamental: Nest.js, Vitest/Playwright, and Kotlin are not evidenced, and Java exposure appears dated, but the breadth of language experience suggests these are learnable quickly.
strengths: 15+ years of experience with recent, directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React full-stack work
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generation experience, matching the required AI agent development skill
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, authored testing tools, CI/CD, Docker/Kubernetes, and community teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin and Python are not evidenced, and Java experience appears limited and several years old
Named testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) do not appear on the resume despite the strong testing background

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling development
Missing Nest.js and named testing-framework experience
